sys_script_client.description:
Publish Draft Tasks; show a widget or UI Page modal to prompt the User when the task has draft subtasks, otherwise no modal just publish this single task
v2.8 2.8.0 | 2022-06-07 | raj | STRY0122882 - Publish Task(s) button- New Modal to 'Choose Which Tasks to Publish'
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit - Publish Draft Tasks
